content: Uncomplicated cystitis treatment: nitrofurantoin 100mg BID x5 days (first-line), TMP-SMX DS BID x3 days (if local resistance <20%), fosfomycin 3g single dose, or pivmecillinam. Fluoroquinolones reserved for resistant cases due to safety concerns. Uncomplicated pyelonephritis: ciprofloxacin 500mg BID x7 days or levofloxacin 750mg daily x5 days; if fluoroquinolone resistance suspected, give initial IV ceftriaxone or aminoglycoside then oral therapy. Complicated UTI: broader empiric coverage based on risk factors and local antibiogram (fluoroquinolone, beta-lactam/beta-lactamase inhibitor, carbapenem for ESBL risk); tailor to culture results. Duration 7-14 days depending on severity. Asymptomatic bacteriuria treated only in pregnancy or before urologic procedures.
